mapper.select: /* selectBvlcode */ select fn_bm_bvlcode() as bvlcode from dual
/* selectBflcode */ select fn_bm_bflcode() as bflcode from dual
/* selectBplcode */ select fn_bm_bplcode() as bplcode from dual
/* selectBvtcode */ select fn_bm_bvtcode() as bvtcode from dual
/* selectBftcode */ select fn_bm_bftcode() as bftcode from dual
